source_jobs.title: Customer Success Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded Series A startup on a mission to make e-commerce logistics more human-friendly and efficient with AI-powered robotics.
Ambi Robotics builds and operates production AI-powered robotic systems that run 24/7 in customer environments across the USA.
We are rebuilding our Customer Success function and seeking an experienced Customer Success Account Manager to own the post-sale journey for a portfolio of enterprise accounts and ensure our customers unlock maximum value from their robotic deployments. You’ll own our most important customer relationships today while shaping how the function operates as the team grows.
The Customer Success Account Manager will report to the COO and work closely with our Operations, Sales, Engineering, and Product teams. The ideal candidate has 3–5 years of experience in Customer Success, Technical Account Management, or a comparable client-facing role, a track record managing enterprise or Fortune 500 accounts, and genuine enthusiasm for rebuilding and scaling a Customer Success function.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded startup on a mission to make e-commerce logistics more human-friendly and efficient with AI-powered robotics. 
Founded by leading robotics researchers, we are growing our team of dynamic and compassionate tech enthusiasts to deploy human-centered robots at scale. Join us in helping people handle more throughout the supply chain!
We're looking for a battle-tested Enterprise Account Executive who has spent a career selling large, complex capital equipment or automation solutions to the world's most demanding supply chain organizations — Amazon, Walmart, Target, UPS, FedEx, and companies of that caliber.
This is not an entry-level or mid-market role. We need someone who has navigated multi-year CapEx sales cycles, built relationships at the VP and C-Suite level within major retailers and logistics operators, and has the scars and wins to prove it. You know how to move a deal from whiteboard to signed MSA and SOW — and you know how to keep a strategic account healthy and growing for years after go-live.
Critically, Ambi already has enterprise customers live in production — household names in retail, e-commerce, and parcel. Your first priority is managing, deepening, and scaling those relationships while simultaneously opening new logos. You'll work cross-functionally with our solutions engineering, product, and operations teams to grow existing deployments into multi-site programs and close the next generation of transformational deals.

source_jobs.title: Sales Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded startup on a mission to make e-commerce logistics more human-friendly and efficient with AI-powered robotics. 
Founded by leading robotics researchers, we are growing our team of dynamic and compassionate tech enthusiasts to deploy human-centered robots at scale. Join us in helping people handle more throughout the supply chain!
We're looking for a driven, AI-savvy Sales Operations Manager to be the connective tissue of our go-to-market engine. A strategist and someone who uses technology to build scalable systems, move fast, and help our sales team close more deals with less friction.
You'll own the infrastructure that powers our sales cycle from first touch to signed contract: CRM hygiene, outreach automation, content organization, legal document management, tradeshow execution, and the ongoing integration of AI tools that keep our team ahead of the curve.

source_jobs.title: Senior Field Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded startup on a mission to make e-commerce logistics more human-friendly and efficient with AI-powered robotics. 
Ambi Robotics builds and operates production AI-powered robotic systems that run 24/7 in customer environments across the USA. 
We are seeking a Senior Field Engineer who will join a strong, experienced team and a track record of solid uptime. This person must have high agency, ownership, and accountability in their work as the actions taken in this role have immediate and visible consequences.
The Senior Field Engineer will report to the Director of Field Engineering, and will manage Field Engineers positioned across the nation. The successful candidates comes from a technical background and is excited to get out into the field to meet the customer and work directly on finding solutions to problems. The ideal candidate will have 3+ years of experience in hardware and software product technical support, and has experience leading distributed technical teams.

source_jobs.title: Senior Robotics Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded startup on a mission to build the nervous system for AI-powered robots in industrial applications.
Founded by leading robotics researchers, we are growing our dynamic, world-class team to deploy robots at scale. Join us in helping people handle more throughout the supply chain!
We are seeking a Senior Robotics Research Engineer to design and develop fundamental new contributions to core robotics libraries and runtime application software for Ambi products, focused on new technology for the future. You will work closely with the Software team and the CTO.

source_jobs.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We are a well-funded Series A startup on a mission to make e-commerce logistics more human-friendly and efficient with AI-powered robotics.

Founded by leading robotics researchers, we are growing our team of dynamic and compassionate tech enthusiasts to deploy human-centered robots at scale. Join us in helping people handle more throughout the supply chain!

We are seeking a Senior Solutions Engineer who can apply our robots to customer environments and ensure successful deployments. The role has a large emphasis on quickly understanding key customer requirements through site visits, analyzing customer application data, and writing statements of work. This role will also interface with customers during initial periods of use, to communicate product updates and help explain machine behavior. 

In this role you will work closely with members of the Product, Sales, and Engineering teams.

notes: AI-powered robotics startup with a mix of engineering and sales roles
